pageContext.name: Loki
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 Series line - Loki! From Marvel: The Infinity Saga, the Loki Art Scale Statue is limited edition and comes atop a detailed and hand-painted throne.  Marvel fans, don't miss your chance to add the Loki 1:10 Statue to your collection!
